scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && touch dist/.nojekyll
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd dist && rm -rf .git && git init -q -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -q -m 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' && git push -f https://github.com/han140497/LoL3D.git gh-pages && rm -rf .git
